versions.version_description: Some chords were mislabeled in previous versions and this version is accurate to the song.
I believe these are the right chords the rest are to far off to make sense changing theres it will just screw them up.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Artist: Rachel Platten
Song: Fight Song

Standard Tuning
NO CAPO


* = strum once


[Intro]

[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Like a small boat[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] 
On the ocean[/tab]
                    
Sending big waves
[tab]     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Into motion[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]
Like how a single word[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Can make a heart open[/tab]
                            
I might only have one match
[tab]          [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch] *
but I can make an explosion[/tab]


[Pre-chorus]

[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
And all those things I didn't say[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]Em7[/ch]
Wrecking balls inside my brain [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I will scream them loud tonight[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch] *
Can you hear my voice this time[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
This is my fight song[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]     
Take back my life song[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Prove I'm alright song[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
My power's turned on[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Starting right now I'll be strong[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em7[/ch]
I'll play my fight song[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]              
And I don't really care if nobody else believes[/tab]
      (n/c)                                  G
Cause I've still got a lot of fight left in me


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
Losing friends and I'm chasing sleep[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Everybody's worried about me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
In too deep[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
Say I'm in too deep[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]
And it's been two years[/tab]

I miss my home
[tab]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
But there's a fire burning in my bones[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
And I still believe[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
Yeah I still believe[/tab]


[Pre-chorus]

[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
And all those things I didn't say[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Em7[/ch]
Wrecking balls inside my brain [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I will scream them loud tonight[/tab]
        (n/c)
Can you hear my voice this time

[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
My power's turned on[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Starting right now I'll be strong[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]              
And I don't really care if nobody else believes[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                                 [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Cause I've still got a lot of fight left in me[/tab]

[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
A lot of fight left in me[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]
